testcase.name: Login should be success
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to the application.....................................passed And User click the Account menu.............................................passed And User click on the login link............................................passed And User enter the email as "demo1.123@gmail.com"...........................passed And User enter the password as "Demo@123"...................................passed When User click on the login button.........................................passed Then My Account should be displayed.........................................passed

testcase.name: Login should not be success
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to the application.....................................passed And User click the Account menu.............................................passed And User click on the login link............................................passed And User enter the email as "demo1.123@gmail.com"...........................passed And User enter the empty password as "".....................................passed When User click on the login button.........................................passed Then Login should be unsuccessful...........................................passed

testcase.name: Valid registration
testcase.system-out: Given User navigated to the application.....................................passed And User clicks the Account menu............................................passed And User click on the register link.........................................passed And User enter the first name as "Harini"...................................passed And User enter the last name as "Raja"......................................passed And User enter the Email as "hariniraja29@gmail.com"........................passed And User enter the telephone as "9865204120"................................passed And User enter the Password as "harini".....................................passed And User enter the conform password as "harini".............................passed And User click the policy check box.........................................passed When User click on the continue button......................................passed Then success should be displayed............................................passed

testcase.name: Register with an existing email
testcase.system-out: Given User navigated to the application.....................................passed And User clicks the Account menu............................................passed And User click on the register link.........................................passed And User enter the first name as "Harini"...................................passed And User enter the last name as "Raja"......................................passed And User enter the Email as "hariniraja29@gmail.com"........................passed And User enter the telephone as "7639704120"................................passed And User enter the Password as "harini".....................................passed And User enter the conform password as "harini".............................passed And User click the policy check box.........................................passed When User click on the continue button......................................passed Then Existing account warning should be displayed...........................passed
